summary: Implemented OnboardingService with 3 plan templates (PPL, Upper/Lower, Full Body), plan creation from templates with exercise name resolution, and onboarding state management via user_settings table.
keyDecisions: Changed OnboardingService interface from async (Promise<>) to sync return types since all underlying repo operations are synchronous with expo-sqlite sync API
Used generateSafeBizKeys() that masks snowflake IDs to 53-bit safe integers to avoid Number precision loss when bigint biz_keys are converted via toDbValue()
Injected SnowflakeIdGenerator as a dependency to enable test isolation and avoid ID collisions across test runs
Templates are hardcoded static data (not DB records) as specified in task requirements
Exercise name-to-biz_key resolution uses a pre-built Map lookup for efficiency within transactions

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: getTemplates() returns at least 3 templates: PPL, Upper/Lower, Full Body
Each template has: name, description, plan_mode, schedule_mode, days with exercises and sets_config
createPlanFromTemplate(template) creates TrainingPlan + TrainingDays + PlanExercises from template
resetOnboarding() clears the flag for re-viewing from Settings
Template exercises reference built-in exercise names from seed data
Unit tests for template creation and state management

notes: Full test suite: 438 tests passing across 14 suites. Services coverage: 94.56%. Onboarding service specific coverage: 97.5% (only uncovered line is the 'Exercise not found' error throw path).
